title: Understanding Public Acceptability of Climate Policies in Europe
authors: Shouyu Zhang; Susana Ferreira; Berna Karali

tax_mentions.context: Support measured by ESS question asking whether respondents favor increasing taxes on fossil fuels such as oil, gas, and coal to reduce climate change.
tax_mentions.notes: Question uses fossil-fuel tax increase as carbon tax proxy.

inclusion_reason: Directly analyzes public support for increasing taxes on fossil fuels to reduce climate change, a clear carbon/fuel-tax acceptability outcome.
